rag_rules: Repair only validator-reported issues; do not modify architecture or add clauses without diagnostic trigger.
generic_rules: Fix unresolved references by aligning with visible AADL elements, not by introducing new ones.
Prefer deleting invalid clauses over adding architecture to resolve type or reference errors.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE clauses must reference only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new properties, bindings, or components to satisfy validator errors — repair must be minimal and diagnostic-driven.
